_doc: Your top-firing lessons compiled into deterministic guards (claude/hooks/guard.py). mode: 'ask-only' = shadow week (every deny is downgraded to ask — run the first week like this), 'enforce' = live. Probes are named functions in guard.py — NEVER shell strings from JSON. In-the-moment override: prefix a command with 'POS_GUARD=skip ' (deny→ask, logged). The installer copies this file to <PERSONAL_OS_HOME>/guards.json and fills author_email from your config (git_author_email); it never overwrites an existing guards.json. Graduate new rules from your own lessons via /lesson --guard. The 'lesson' field is a display-only wikilink to the lesson a rule was compiled from — adapt or drop it.

rules.reason: Never pipe a deploy CLI through `| tail` — tail buffers, the streaming progress disappears and the deploy looks falsely stuck. Run it without the pipe.
Piping into `vercel env add` can store the value EMPTY. Use the Vercel dashboard or the REST API instead, then cross-check with `vercel env pull`.

A .env file sits in this folder but no .vercelignore covers it — the Vercel CLI uploads local .env files as runtime env (.gitignore only protects the repo, not the deployment). Fix: create .vercelignore with `.env` + `.env.*`, then deploy again.

git user.email does not match your deploy account — some platforms silently ignore pushes from an unknown author (no deploy, no error). Fix: repo-local `git config user.email <your-email>` (never --global).
This checkout is behind origin (as of the last fetch) — a CLI deploy bundles YOUR local tree, not origin. Safe: a fresh worktree from origin/main, or pull first.
No fresh preflight marker (full tsc + author check) for this HEAD. Fix: run preflight.sh from your scripts dir — full tsconfig, not tsconfig.app.json (30 min TTL).
Multiple worktrees are active: `git add -A/.` sweeps another session's WIP into your commit. Stage ONLY your own paths; then read `git diff --cached --name-only`.
The index ALREADY contains staged changes — `git add -A` mixes them with everything else. Quick check: `git diff --cached --name-only`.

Tracked WIP is uncommitted. Classify it first (identical/superseded/unique via `git cherry -v` + diff direction), back up: `git add -u && git commit` on backup/<date> — THEN reset. Careful: reset --hard also hits untracked files whose path is tracked upstream.

DEPLOY VERIFICATION (mandatory afterwards, push/deploy != live): (1) `vercel ls` — age vs commit time; (2) `vercel inspect` — alias truth (edge-cache curls lie for minutes); (3) grep a content fingerprint in the built chunk + verify the same chunk live, with a positive control; (4) on 'my SHA is missing': `git merge-base --is-ancestor` instead of panic.
